description:
A boutique real estate agency needs three new property listings added to their WordPress website using native Custom Fields (postmeta). Create a category named 'Properties' and publish the following three listings assigned to it, ensuring each includes the specified title, content, custom fields, and comment settings. Do not use external plugins for custom fields.

**Listing 1:**
- Title: 8424 Bluebonnet Lane, Austin, TX 78758
- Content: A charming mid-century modern home featuring an open floor plan, updated kitchen with quartz countertops, and a spacious backyard with mature oak trees. Located in the highly sought-after North Austin neighborhood, close to the tech corridor.
- Custom Fields: property_price: 525000, property_beds: 3, property_baths: 2, property_sqft: 1850, property_status: Active
- Comments: Enabled

**Listing 2:**
- Title: 1904 Ocean Drive, Miami Beach, FL 33139
- Content: Stunning oceanfront condo with panoramic views of the Atlantic. This luxury unit includes floor-to-ceiling impact windows, a wrap-around balcony, and access to resort-style amenities including a heated pool, fitness center, and 24/7 concierge.
- Custom Fields: property_price: 1450000, property_beds: 2, property_baths: 2.5, property_sqft: 2100, property_status: Pending
- Comments: Enabled

**Listing 3:**
- Title: 755 Pinecone Ridge, Denver, CO 80204
- Content: Cozy mountain-view retreat just minutes from downtown. Features a wood-burning fireplace, newly renovated master suite, and a large deck perfect for entertaining. The unfinished basement offers great potential for expansion.
- Custom Fields: property_price: 485000, property_beds: 4, property_baths: 3, property_sqft: 2400, property_status: Sold
- Comments: Disabled
